$comment: Layer C for DISCOUNT vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Two source*constant ROUNDED computes (bulk and standard tiers): the standard tier is realizable by inverting gross = qty * price; the bulk tier's realization conflicts with its own path condition (qty must be both >= 100 and the unit factor), so it is expected UNREALIZED on that path — disclosed in the certificate.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 DISCOUNT (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-discount)
